title: Resolution Encouraging All Supermarkets, Grocery Stores, Drugstores, Pharmacies and Other Similar Establishments in the Municipality of Los Baños to Designate a Special Lane for Health Care Workers, Uniformed Personnel, Employees on Skeletal Workforce and Other Frontliners Leading the Fight Against the Covid-19 Pandemic. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 04/03/20)
